readme: Config for tracker-protection integration tests with sample tracker data and surrogate rules.

settings.trackerData: {"trackers":{"tracker.example":{"domain":"tracker.example","owner":{"name":"Tracker Inc","displayName":"Tracker Inc"},"default":"block","rules":[{"rule":"tracker\\.example/scripts/analytics\\.js","surrogate":"analytics.js"}]},"allowed.example":{"domain":"allowed.example","owner":{"name":"Allowed Inc"},"default":"ignore","rules":[]}},"entities":{"Tracker Inc":{"domains":["tracker.example"],"displayName":"Tracker Inc","prevalence":0.1},"Test Site Inc":{"domains":["localhost","affiliated-cdn.example"],"displayName":"Test Site Inc","prevalence":0.05}},"domains":{"tracker.example":"Tracker Inc","localhost":"Test Site Inc","affiliated-cdn.example":"Test Site Inc"}}
